title: Cut next release
description: Run the opencode-snippets release workflow: verify CI, determine the conventional-commit version bump, update package and schema URLs, tag, push, and verify publish workflow.
close_reason: Released v2.2.3: bumped package/schema URLs, pushed tag, verified GitHub release and npm publish workflow, and updated global config schema URL.

title: Fix plural snippet trigger matching
description: Why: typing escaped plural snippet references like #_beads currently resolves to the singular bead match, suggesting snippet lookup favors word-boundary or prefix behavior over the best substring/exact candidate. What: add regression coverage first, then repair matching so plural names and substring matches resolve correctly without sacrificing matcher performance.
acceptance_criteria: #_beads resolves to the beads snippet rather than bead; matcher behavior is covered by tests; focused tests and build pass
close_reason: Fixed compact alias insertion for separator-prefixed autocomplete queries and verified with tests plus TUI smoke.

title: Rename /snippet to /snippets and add /snippets:reload
description: Follow-up from missing-snippet work. Change the command namespace from singular to plural, and investigate whether OpenCode TUI accepts a slash command named /snippets:reload. If valid, add a dedicated reload command; if not, choose the closest supported alternative and document the constraint.
close_reason: Renamed slash command surface to /snippets, added /snippets:reload via existing loader reload path, and updated tests/docs.
